data_source: IRIS FDSN waveform service via obspy — station IU.ANMO (Albuquerque NM, global reference station), channel BHZ (broadband vertical, 20 sps), 2020-01-01 to 2020-01-03. Full-resolution continuous seismic noise + any regional/teleseismic events.
encoding_notes: Raw 32-bit integer counts (nm/s), merged to single trace, clipped to [p1, p99] amplitude range to remove spike outliers, then discretised into 20 equal-width amplitude bins. Each sample encoded as a single ASCII character 'A'–'T'. 20 sps × ~2 days ≈ 3.5M samples; capped at 1,000,000 for entropy computation.
